title: ilex scopulorum
intro: Ilex scopulorum, also known as Rocky Mountain holly or mountain holly, is a small evergreen shrub native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Ilex scopulorum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection. Ilex scopulorum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of certain health issues.
